TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Matabalay, title = Matabalay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Matabalay} }

S.FORM: alang Matabalay ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 142 buwan, 380 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 74% kyan ku 283 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 26% kyan ku 97 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 71%, saySiyat 1%, Amis 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Matabalay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Matabalay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Matabalay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Matabalay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Matabalay hya' ga Gali-hwan. tay 'llaw na Matabalay hya' ga Mabatuan. rekisi kayal masikinut ku kayan runi kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan ungat la kisya' glagan spyangan na pinbahu ali 桂竹筍 ulyux 生薑 palikaway 李子 azimux 桃 ziluk na sayhu' 草莓 ralu' 甜柿 uwaw na itayal小米酒 Ubuy qqmayh

alang Matabalay ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 142 buwan, 380 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 74% kyan ku 283 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 26% kyan ku 97 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 71%, saySiyat 1%, Amis 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Matabalay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Matabalay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Matabalay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Matabalay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Matabalay hya' ga Gali-hwan. tay 'llaw na Matabalay hya' ga Mabatuan. rekisi kayal masikinut ku kayan runi kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan ungat la kisya' glagan spyangan na pinbahu ali 桂竹筍 ulyux 生薑 palikaway 李子 azimux 桃 ziluk na sayhu' 草莓 ralu' 甜柿 uwaw na itayal小米酒 Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mataβalaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mataβalaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mataβalaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mataβalaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mataβalaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mataβalaj ħjaʔ ɣa ɣali-ħwan. taj ʔllaw na mataβalaj ħjaʔ ɣa maβatuan. rekis~ɕi kajal mas~ɕikinut ku kajan runi kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan uŋat la kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlaɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu ali *** uljux ** palikawaj ** azimux * ziluk na s~ɕajħuʔ ** raluʔ ** uwaw na itajal*** uβuj qqmajħ
